title: Upstart, Like Its Customers, Remains Focused on Return to Growth
text: Upstart demonstrated momentum in its return to growth following Q3 2024 earnings. The company showed resilience through operational improvements and strategic partnerships. With loan originations growing 30% year-over-year to $1.6 billion and revenue growing 20% to $162 million in Q3 2024, Upstart proved its ability to grow during challenging macroeconomic conditions. The company's focus on AI model improvements drove conversion rate enhancements and operational efficiency gains. Dave Girouard emphasized that future growth will continue leveraging AI model improvements rather than waiting for macroeconomic relief. The company's capital partnerships expanded significantly with over half of loan funding coming from committed partnerships rather than spot market funding. Upstart's strategy of focusing on core business fundamentals, investing in AI model improvements, and building strategic capital partnerships positioned the company for sustainable growth.
